channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Raiders hire Bucs assistant general manager John Spytek as their GM, AP source says
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders hired Tampa Bay Buccaneers assistant general manager John Spytek to be their GM, a person with knowledge of the situation tells The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Detroit Lions defensive coordinator Aaron Glenn to become head coach of Jets, per reports
item.description: Detroit Lions defensive coordinator Aaron Glenn is leaving to become the head coach of the New York Jets, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: AP's all-College Football Playoff team features an all-Ohio State offensive backfield
item.description: Ohio State’s run to its first national championship in a decade enabled the Buckeyes to dominate the Associated Press’ all-College Football Playoff team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dodgers announce deal with prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki, who gets $6.5 million signing bonus
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Dodgers announced their deal with prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki on Wednesday, agreeing to a minor league contract with a $6.5 million signing bonus.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Spurs-Pacers games in Paris have a notable absence, with Gregg Popovich recovering at home
item.description: PARIS (AP) — Indiana's Rick Carlisle has coached more games against San Antonio's Gregg Popovich than anyone else. They've had 87 head-to-head matchups, including playoffs. Thursday was supposed to be No. 88.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA postpones Bucks-Pelicans game after historic snow storm in New Orleans
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The NBA has postponed Wednesday night's game in New Orleans between the Milwaukee Bucks and the Pelicans after a historic winter storm dumped about a foot of snow in the Big Easy.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: American tennis star Ben Shelton puts Australian Open TV interviewers on blast over treatment of players
item.description: Ben Shelton called out TV interviewers at the Australian Open following his quarterfinal victory over what he said were numerous incidents of disrespectful treatment of players.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ichiro Suzuki, CC Sabathia and Billy Wagner elected to Baseball Hall of Fame
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Used to leading off, Ichiro Suzuki got antsy when he had to wait. Considered a no-doubt pick for baseball's Hall of Fame and possibly the second unanimous selection, he waited by the phone for the expected call Tuesday. Fifteen minutes passed without a ring.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Capitals netminder Logan Thompson blames rogue nacho platter for Oilers goal
item.description: A cheesy interruption during the Capitals game in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada, on Tuesday night almost threatened Washington's win streak, which improved to five straight after a win over the Oilers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Minding the bumpers and kick-out holes, pinball’s elite crown state champions at intense Concord tournaments
item.description: From noon to nearly midnight, they hunched over more than a dozen machines in Concord, trying to score as many points as possible before missing a critical flipper hit or losing balls rolling into the outlane and down the drain.
item.dc:creator: Katie Lauer, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump’s gender executive order a ‘full erasure’ on transgender rights, Bay Area advocates say
item.description: Trump could withhold federal funding on health care programs and education despite California state laws that prohibit discrimination in both those areas, state legislator says.
item.dc:creator: Julia Prodis Sulek, Molly Gibbs, The Mercury News

item.title: Evans' goal late in the third period completes Canadiens' rally past Lightning in 3-2 victory
item.description: Jake Evans scored the winning goal with 2:15 remaining to rally the Montreal Canadiens past the Tampa Bay Lightning 3-2 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agree to a multiyear contract extension after a 14-win season
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings and coach Kevin O'Connell agreed to terms on a multiyear contract extension on Tuesday, following a 14-3 regular season that defied external widespread preseason projections of at least a losing record if not a last-place finish in the NFC North.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool beats Lille to reach Champions League round of 16. Barcelona wins 9-goal thriller
item.description: Liverpool became the first team to guarantee a place in the last 16 of the new Champions League format by beating Lille 2-1 on Tuesday, while Barcelona fought back from two goals down to stun Benfica 5-4 in a thriller.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: With Ben Johnson on the move to Chicago, 5 head coaching vacancies remain
item.description: Ben Johnson made a quick decision. Aaron Glenn could be next. With Johnson heading to Chicago and Mike Vrabel already in New England, five head coaching vacancies remain. The Jets, Saints, Jaguars, Raiders and Cowboys are still in the hunt.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Los Angeles 11-year-old pulls one-of-a-kind baseball card
item.description: An 11-year-old baseball card collector from Los Angeles just pulled what is likely the most important card they will ever pull. Topps, the card manufacturer, confirmed Tuesday morning that the Paul Skenes 1/1 Debut Patch card was in fact unpacked. The card features the patch that the 2023 No.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Actor Michael Rapaport suggests Knicks sign Barron Trump to a contract
item.description: Barron Trump attended his father's inauguration and stood at an estimated 6-foot-8, which appeared to prompt the comedian to urge his favorite NBA team to consider the 18-year-old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: RSL signs Brazilian goalkeeper Rafael Cabral
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake has gone into South America to find its new starting goalkeeper. RSL announced the signing of Brazilian keeper Rafael Cabral Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohio State celebrates and gets ready for all the changes coming to college football in 2025
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The early betting favorite to win next year's national championship: Ohio State. The question nobody can really answer at this time: What sort of sport will the Buckeyes or anyone else return to when they kick it off again seven months from now.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart scores first basket in Unrivaled history in debut of 3-on-3 women's league
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unrivaled shined brightly on its opening night. The 3-on-3 women’s basketball league co-founded by WNBA stars Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier debuted Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says he intends to sign with Los Angeles Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Prized Japanese pitcher Roki Sasaki says in an Instagram post he intends to sign with the World Series champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How to watch Stanford vs. UNC basketball in the Bay Area
item.description: (KRON) -- The Stanford Cardinal men's basketball team will face North Carolina in a cross-country ACC battle on Saturday. The game is being shown exclusively on KRON4. Stanford (11-6, 3-3 ACC) and UNC (12-6, 5-1 ACC) tip off at 11:15 a.m. PT. You can watch on KRON4 on stream on the CW app.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Jack Vig Joins Elite Club with 1,000-Point Milestone
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Plateau Valley High School senior Jack Vig recently reached a milestone few high school basketball players achieve — a 1,000-point career “It just felt like another two points for my career. It wasn’t a big deal for me.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: White Sox announce 16 signings in 2025 international class
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have agreed to terms with 16 international players, including two ranked in the Top 100 available prospects, Alejandro Cruz and Orlando Patiño, and other prospects with potential.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
